name: Generated
description:
ganti api key nya dengan ini total 3 api jadi kalo ada api yang down masih ada cadangan
BASE URL: https://api.siputzx.my.id
OTAKUDESU

GET /api/anime/otakudesu/search?s=<query> → cari anime
GET /api/anime/otakudesu/ongoing → daftar ongoing
GET /api/anime/otakudesu/detail?url=<anime_url> → detail + list episode [{title, link, date}]
GET /api/anime/otakudesu/download?url=<episode_url> → link download [{quality, link, host}]

SAMEHADAKU

GET /api/anime/samehadaku/search?s=<query> → cari anime
GET /api/anime/samehadaku/latest → anime terbaru
GET /api/anime/samehadaku/release → jadwal rilis
GET /api/anime/samehadaku/download?url=<episode_url> → link download

OPLOVERZ

GET /api/anime/oploverz-search?s=<query> → cari anime
GET /api/anime/oploverz-ongoing → daftar ongoing
GET /api/anime/oploverz-episode?url=<episode_url> → detail episode
